methodology: Per pathogen type, rank static_burden_midpoint and -evolutionary_trajectory_slope as percentile scores; typology labels use top quartile (>=75th pct) thresholds: high_burden_high_trajectory, high_burden, high_trajectory, or moderate. Includes Stage 3 cluster_id for context. Integrity layer quality_gate derived from identifiability ledger rules (AMR_2026_COMBINED_EXECUTION_PLAN §5): interpretable classification → pass; breakpoint-absent / majority unclassifiable → bounds_only or withhold; confounded intervention LE estimates → withhold rank.
